name: aliens
stylePhrase: organic curved biotech 3D game asset render, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting

w.label: pearlescent alien
w.palette: luminous pearlescent grey-green biotech carapace, smooth iridescent curves, soft pale glow along the ridges

b.label: insectoid alien
b.palette: dark glossy insectoid carapace, deep charcoal and violet chitin, violet bioluminescent veins along the ridges

pieces.q: a slender {SIDE} broodmother, more slender than the hive monarch
pieces.r: a hardened {SIDE} bio-tower, its ridged carapace like a fortified shell
pieces.b: a {SIDE} psion with an elongated cranial ridge
pieces.n: a {SIDE} predator with a curved, horse-like alien skull

promptOverrides.wq: single chess QUEEN game piece, clearly recognizable classic chess queen silhouette, a tall slender alien broodmother topped with a crest of five curved organic tendrils fanning outward and upward like an open flower, each tendril rounded and smooth with wide open gaps of visible background between them, the fanned tendril crest is the very top of the piece, luminous pearlescent grey-green biotech carapace, smooth iridescent curves, soft pale glow along the ridges, organic curved biotech 3D game asset render, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting, centered composition, plain solid gray studio background, no ground shadow, no text
promptOverrides.bq: single chess QUEEN game piece, clearly recognizable classic chess queen silhouette, a tall slender alien broodmother topped with a crest of five curved organic tendrils fanning outward and upward like an open flower, each tendril rounded and smooth with wide open gaps of visible background between them, the fanned tendril crest is the very top of the piece with nothing above or between the tendrils, the tall slender stem below the crest is covered in the same cracked chitin plating and glowing violet veins as the rest of the body, dark glossy insectoid carapace, deep charcoal and violet chitin, violet bioluminescent veins along the ridges running the full height of the piece, organic curved biotech 3D game asset render, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting, centered composition, plain solid gray studio background, no ground shadow, no text
